config.github.readonly_hint: Sakriy hone par, keval pathan sanchaalan ki anumati hai (koi repo nirmaan, ishu band karna aadi nahin)
config.github.owner_hint: Aapka GitHub upyogakarta naam ya sangathan ka naam
config.github.token_hint: Personal Access Token (PAT) - Vault mein encrypt karke store kiya jata hai
config.github.base_url_hint: Keval GitHub Enterprise ke liye badlen. Default: https://api.github.com
config.github.default_private_label: Naye repo default roop se niji
config.github.default_private_hint: Sakriy hone par, naye repo niji ke roop mein set kiye jaate hain
config.github.allowed_repos_desc: Agent keval yahaan soochibaddh repos tak pahunch sakta hai. Agent dwara banaye gaye repos hamesha anumati prapt hain. Yadi soochi khaali hai, to agent keval apne banaye repos tak pahunch sakta hai.
config.github.fetch_to_edit_hint: Soochi sampadit karne ke liye Repos prapt karen par click karen
config.github.repos_list_empty: Apne GitHub repos load karne ke liye Repos prapt karen par click karen
config.github.agent_created_note: Agent dwara banaye gaye repos hamesha sulabh hote hain - spasht anumodan ke bina bhi.
config.github.agent_created_always_allow: Agent dwara banaya gaya - hamesha anumati prapt
